output.sar_narrative: Transaction 3557835 received a fraud score of 0.0888 (get_transaction_details), well below the medium-risk threshold of 0.40. The SHAP explanation (get_shap_explanation) identified only one risk-increasing feature — tx_hour at 12.38 (SHAP +0.337, reason code R07) — while five of the six top features actively decreased the model's fraud probability, including the transaction amount of $47.95, card profile (card5=166), and behavioral count features C14 and C5. Customer history (get_customer_history) for card 2581 shows the card is active across all hours of the day (hours 0–24 observed in the 30-day window), which weakens the time-of-day anomaly signal, and the transaction amount of $47.95 falls below the card's 30-day mean of $64.92. Adverse action code retrieval (get_reason_codes) returned only a single code, R07, further corroborating that no multi-factor fraud pattern is present.

supporting_evidence.claim: The model's fraud probability score is low at 0.0888, below the 0.40 medium-risk threshold.
Only one SHAP feature increases fraud risk (tx_hour); five top features decrease it.
supporting_evidence.value: tx_hour SHAP +0.33661 (increases_risk); V70 SHAP -0.32253, C14 SHAP -0.29242, C5 SHAP -0.28602, card5 SHAP -0.20851, TransactionAmt SHAP -0.20169 (all decreases_risk)

supporting_evidence.claim: The card has been active across virtually all hours of the day in the past 30 days, reducing the significance of the tx_hour anomaly flag.
The transaction amount of $47.95 is below the card's 30-day mean transaction amount of $64.92, indicating no unusual spending spike.
The product code 'W' and email domain 'gmail.com' are consistent with the card's established usage pattern.
Only a single adverse action reason code (R07 — time-of-day anomaly) was returned, indicating no multi-factor fraud signal.
supporting_evidence.value: adverse_action_codes: [{code: 'R07', description: 'Time-of-day or day-of-week anomaly for this account', driven_by_feature: 'tx_hour'}]

supporting_evidence.claim: The card has a high transaction volume of 160 transactions in the past 30 days with a total spend of $10,387.09, indicating an established, active account.
